home.title: Learn, create and teach with your integrated AI
home.subtitle: Hummind allows you to design, deliver and scale personalised learning journeys for schools, bootcamps and organisations.
home.meta: Built for African schools · Multi-tenant · Secure · Observability powered by PostHog.

spaces.admin: Manage institutions, tenants, admins and global platform settings.
spaces.auth: Access login, registration and authentication features.
spaces.organisation: Manage classes, teachers, learners and your organisation’s configuration.
spaces.public: Access the public website, discover features and documentation.
spaces.user: Follow courses, progress through modules and interact with the AI tutor.

home.analyticsDesc: All clicks and interactions are automatically tracked with PostHog.
